TRACE_ENT|0|test_data_types_l1|0|Arg0=-1208477328,Arg1=-1081975888,Arg2=0,Arg3=-1210523743|eax=0xb7f4edd8,ebx=0x0,ecx=0xbf825bb0,edx=0xbf825bd4,esi=0xb7f4d000,edi=0x0
TRACE_PRINT|0|%3D%3D%3D%20%54%65%73%74%69%6E%67%20%44%61%74%61%20%54%79%70%65%73%20%28%4C%31%29%20%3D%3D%3D
TRACE_PRINT|0|%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%31%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%63%68%61%72%29%3A%20%61%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%31%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%63%68%61%72%29%3A%20%62%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%32%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%73%68%6F%72%74%29%3A%20%33%30%30%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%33%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%69%6E%74%29%3A%20%31%31%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%34%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%6C%6F%6E%67%29%3A%20%32%30%30%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%35%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%6C%6C%29%3A%20%2D%34%36%34%37%30%35%31%30%35%34%30%32%30%35%34%38%38%34%38%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%36%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%66%6C%6F%61%74%29%3A%20%2D%30%2E%30%31%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%37%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%64%6F%75%62%6C%65%29%3A%20%2D%30%2E%30%31%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%38%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%6C%64%29%3A%20%2D%32%33%31%32%32%37%31%33%39%35%39%31%33%33%34%30%34%31%31%35%39%34%38%37%37%33%38%35%30%30%35%38%31%37%36%36%31%36%32%37%32%34%32%33%38%35%31%31%34%35%31%39%35%34%33%38%38%34%38%39%38%38%36%33%30%32%30%31%34%35%38%31%31%31%31%31%33%35%30%38%36%35%32%38%34%39%31%32%39%31%38%37%39%35%39%32%38%36%36%35%38%30%33%32%35%37%35%30%38%36%37%32%37%33%39%31%39%34%36%37%39%35%33%33%33%30%36%33%36%33%32%38%38%32%35%36%32%31%36%33%35%37%30%36%38%37%31%37%31%31%31%31%30%38%30%38%34%33%30%32%30%34%34%36%37%33%30%33%34%35%34%32%32%32%30%33%36%37%34%30%36%39%39%37%30%39%38%35%37%38%30%33%35%38%39%31%32%31%39%39%33%36%33%39%36%35%39%33%38%30%39%30%34%33%36%32%31%30%39%32%34%38%35%34%30%31%33%32%34%31%38%31%30%39%33%33%31%33%38%33%36%32%34%33%31%38%34%37%33%31%30%38%39%36%30%33%38%36%30%35%39%31%34%33%33%39%37%33%32%36%32%37%34%39%34%36%34%31%39%32%33%31%36%37%39%38%33%38%39%30%31%32%32%31%30%34%36%32%35%33%39%38%38%35%32%34%35%34%33%35%37%36%39%35%31%30%32%35%33%34%31%35%34%32%35%30%36%33%36%38%38%35%34%30%39%38%35%30%33%30%35%36%39%35%36%30%30%32%39%30%31%36%35%35%39%31%32%34%35%32%38%37%34%33%34%32%33%39%32%39%33%30%30%37%34%33%33%34%31%36%32%36%38%38%34%38%30%33%37%31%33%36%30%37%38%30%34%31%37%37%30%36%37%38%35%31%38%37%33%31%39%38%31%38%34%32%39%35%34%38%36%32%30%32%37%35%30%36%32%33%34%38%35%36%38%38%36%35%30%36%32%33%39%30%31%32%39%39%34%34%37%30%39%31%35%31%34%37%39%36%36%31%31%31%30%33%37%33%33%31%36%32%33%30%39%31%31%35%35%35%34%34%32%38%34%32%37%34%37%38%38%39%34%34%31%33%34%32%30%32%32%34%36%30%38%33%30%33%38%36%33%36%30%39%37%38%32%36%30%35%39%35%39%34%38%33%39%34%34%33%39%33%30%37%35%39%37%35%34%34%36%36%39%38%38%37%39%34%36%30%33%37%32%34%38%30%36%32%33%38%33%32%32%39%39%37%32%31%39%37%38%32%33%34%32%38%38%33%37%30%33%34%31%36%38%34%33%32%31%33%34%37%34%39%39%35%30%36%38%35%33%33%35%33%35%39%37%33%34%35%35%35%34%38%31%38%35%34%30%38%33%31%39%32%37%34%30%32%37%39%39%36%31%31%36%31%34%39 5%36%34%36%34%34%34%35%31%38%37%35%32%38%30%36%31%34%32%38%37%38%30%33%31%39%35%37%31%34%31%35%35%35%32%30%31%34%39%33%32%30%31%37%31%35%33%31%35%30%35%38%36%34%39%38%31%32%36%34%37%39%39%39%37%31%33%33%30%32%34%30%38%37%31%36%35%35%37%35%37%32%38%38%37%34%37%30%39%30%36%31%34%33%33%30%36%34%35%37%33%32%37%37%38%39%33%38%32%30%38%34%33%35%39%32%33%30%35%39%38%36%34%37%32%33%30%39%32%39%36%32%38%30%33%37%33%30%36%32%33%31%38%30%37%32%32%30%30%30%36%37%34%33%32%35%31%37%36%35%32%32%34%34%39%38%38%32%39%34%30%38%37%39%31%33%37%30%33%39%39%35%31%36%37%36%37%39%32%37%39%35%33%31%30%32%30%33%30%39%31%30%37%34%37%30%38%35%34%34%39%31%36%37%35%31%30%36%30%38%31%34%36%35%34%33%34%31%31%32%2E%30%30%0A
TRACE_PRINT|0|%44%54%2D%4C%31%2D%30%39%20%28%70%72%6F%63%65%73%73%5F%62%6F%6F%6C%29%3A%20%31%0A
